title: Analytics Engineer - Data Services (Python & Prompt Engineering Focus)
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking an Analytics Engineer to design and build Python-based solutions on Google Cloud. In this role, you will develop scalable cloud data services, create and optimize data models, and implement automation workflows. You will leverage prompt engineering and hosted LLM services (e.g., Gemini) to build templates to extract information and AI-powered automation. You will also design APIs and data pipelines to support analytics and AI initiatives, collaborating closely with business and product teams to translate requirements into reliable, practical solutions.

Key Responsibilities

• Develop high-quality Python code with strong emphasis on testing, performance, and maintainability.

• Build and operate cloud-based data services using GCP tools such as BigQuery and DataProc.

• Design and optimize database models using SQL.

• Create and maintain prompt templates for analytics and automation, applying prompt engineering to extract actionable insights from raw text and email content.

• Develop data pipelines and APIs to enable analytics and product development.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to convert business needs into technical solutions.

• Solve complex problems using large and diverse datasets.

Education

Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, or a related field required.

Experience

• Open to both fresh graduates and experienced professionals. Candidates with hands-on experience in analytics or software development - particularly in Python and cloud-based solutions, will be preferred. Fresh graduates should be able to demonstrate a relevant portfolio of projects showcasing their skills.

• Proven expertise in designing, building, and maintaining robust data-driven applications and data products.

• Strong commitment to code quality, testing practices, and production-ready deployments.

• Hands-on experience with prompt engineering and integrating hosted LLM services (e.g., Gemini APIs) to design end-to-end automation workflows.

• Practical experience with CI/CD pipelines for code productization, including automated testing, packaging, and deployment.

postedCompany.description:
Singapore Exchange (SGX) is the Asian Gateway, connecting investors in search of Asian growth to corporate issuers in search of global capital. SGX represents the premier access point for managing Asian capital and investment exposure, and is Asia’s most international exchange with more than 40% of companies listed on SGX originating outside of Singapore. SGX offers its clients the world’s biggest offshore market for Asian equity futures, centred on Asia’s three largest economies – China, India and Japan.

In addition to offering a fully integrated value chain from trading and clearing, to settlement and depository services, SGX is also Asia’s pioneering central clearing house. Headquartered in Asia’s most globalised city, and centred within the AAA strength and stability of Singapore’s island nation, SGX is a leading Asian counterparty for the clearing of financial and commodity products.

 

Personal Data Protection Act

By submitting your application for this job, you are authorizing SGX to:

a) collect and use your personal data, and to disclose such data to any third party with whom SGX or any of its related corporation has service arrangements, in each case for all purposes in connection with your job application, and employment with SGX; and

b) retain your personal data for 1 year for consideration of future job opportunities (where applicable for relevant unsuccessful job applicants).

For more information, please visit www.sgx.com
postedCompany.name: SINGAPORE EXCHANGE LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
